reason: The measured nm-style compute blocks are 7.70x to 23.27x below the first Llama7B 131k HBM-bound compute floor across 1200 to 400 mm2 dies, so compute architecture density remains the immediate blocker.
next_action: Define a denser clustered compute architecture target near 131072 MAC/cycle before investing in detailed global SRAM/NoC arbitration simulation.
